description_long: This chaise features a modern, industrial design with a flat, rectangular seating surface and a single, straight backrest running along one long edge. The frame appears to be constructed from metal, with visible bolts and structural supports, and is equipped with four sturdy wheels for mobility. The seat and backrest surfaces are smooth and likely made from a solid, durable material, possibly metal or composite, with a matte finish. The overall form is minimalist, with no visible armrests or decorative elements, emphasizing function over ornamentation. The legs are straight and robust, supporting the weight of the structure and any users. This piece is suitable for public urban environments such as parks, transit stations, or communal outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, industrial-style chaise with a flat seat, straight backrest, and metal frame on wheels, featuring a minimalist, functional design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the flat seat, straight backrest, and two visible wheels at the base.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full length of the backrest and the open space beneath the seat, with all four wheels visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the seat, backrest, and wheels from the other end.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the full rectangular seat and the straight backrest along one edge.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is a single, straight, flat panel running the full length of one long edge of the chaise, with no visible curvature, segmentation, or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, tubular metal supports integrated into the frame, each terminating in a wheel for mobility, with a utilitarian, industrial appearance and no decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The seat and backrest surfaces are solid and smooth, with no visible upholstery, pattern, tufting, or surface treatment.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are no visible cushions; the seating and backrest surfaces appear to be hard and unupholstered.
